data.title: Anthro Energy Receives U.S. Department of Energy Approval to Advance First U.S.-Owned Advanced Electrolyte Manufacturing Facility into Execution Phase
data.description: A significant achievement is driving the return of crucial battery components to the U.S. and bolstering supply chain resilience. Taking place in ALAMEDA, Calif. on April 28, 2026, Anthro Energy, a cutting-edge battery firm, is making strides in creating advanced polymer electrolytes for lithium-ion batteries. This development marks a key step in enhancing energy storage technology and domestic manufacturing.

data.title: Celebrate Pride Year-Round in Iceland, a Global Leader in LGBTQ+ Travel
data.description: Iceland has established itself as a standout LGBTQ+ friendly destination, known for its prominent Pride festivities, local LGBTQ+ events, and exceptional wedding options. On April 28, 2026, in New York, it was reported that Iceland maintains its position as a worldwide frontrunner in LGBTQ+ acceptance. The country is recognized among the top destinations for LGBTQ+ travelers, offering a welcoming and inclusive environment for all.

data.title: 10ZiG and Nerdio Expand Partnership to Lower TCO and Simplify AVD and Windows 365
data.description: Enhanced partnership improves comprehensive assistance for Azure Virtual Desktop and Windows 365 implementations in PHOENIX on April 28, 2026. 10ZiG® Technology, a top supplier of thin and zero client products for VDI, DaaS, and web applications, unveiled this initiative.

data.title: Virtas and RapidCanvas Announce Strategic Partnership to Transform Financial Consulting into AI-Powered Execution
data.description: A recent collaboration has integrated artificial intelligence (AI) into financial workflows, leading to quicker execution, decreased manual input, and more intelligent decision-making on a large scale. The partnership was unveiled in Austin, Texas on April 28, 2026. Virtas Partners, a consulting company specializing in solutions for the Office of the Chief Financial Officer (CFO), played a significant role in this initiative.

data.title: The Honor Foundation Announces New Chief Executive Officer, Kelly McGraw
data.description: The leadership of a national non-profit organization serving military communities is set to undergo a change as it looks to enhance its impact through the expansion of programs. The Honor Foundation, operating for more than ten years, will be implementing this transition in San Diego on April 28, 2026. This organization has been dedicated to providing elite military transition assistance and aims to further its reach in order to benefit a larger number of individuals within these communities.

data.title: Isos Technology Announces Leadership Transition to Support Next Phase of Growth and Innovation
data.description: In a press release on April 28, 2026, Isos Technology, a prominent Atlassian consulting and solutions partner supported by The Acacia Group, revealed changes in its leadership structure. Ron Thompson Jr has been named as the new President of the company, taking over from Founder Thad West, who will now serve as the Executive Chairman. This shift in positions marks a strategic move for the company as it progresses towards continued success.

data.title: Angle Advisors announces Shift Transit has been recapitalized by Main Street Capital Corporation
data.description: Birmingham, MI, 28th April 2026 - Angle Advisors disclosed the successful recapitalization of Shift Transit, LLC and Shift Transit Inc., premier micromobility operators offering maintenance and logistics services for docked bikeshare and scooter share systems throughout North America. Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) led the recapitalization, collaborating with Shift Transit's founders and current owners. Main Street Capital's investment amounted to $40.0 million, including senior secured term debt and a minority equity investment.

data.title: HealthTree Foundation Named a Leading Innovator in CMS "Kill the Clipboard" First Wave HealthTech Ecosystem Launch Event
data.description: Salt Lake City - On April 28, 2026, the HealthTree Foundation made it to the top 20 out of 700 applications considered for the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) HealthTech Ecosystem Live! First Wave Launch event held on April 9, 2026. The event took place in Washington, showcasing promising innovations in healthcare technology.

data.title: Perry Capital Acquires Elmwood Reclaimed Timber, Building a National Platform for Premium Wood Products and Custom Furnishings
data.description: Perry Capital LLC has recently completed the acquisition of Elmwood Reclaimed Timber, a well-known reclaimed wood manufacturer. This move merges Elmwood with KC Custom Hardwoods, expanding their scope in the luxury wood products market. The combined entity will now cater to architects, designers, builders, and homeowners across the country, offering a wider range of offerings. This acquisition signifies a strategic development in the industry, with significant implications for those involved.

data.title: Global Brokerage The Agency Launches Office in Missoula, Montana
data.description: Global real estate brokerage The Agency is expanding its presence in the Mountain West region with the opening of its third office in Montana. The latest office, located in Missoula, was launched on April 28, 2026. This marks a significant milestone for the brokerage as it continues to grow its footprint in the state. The Agency now operates three offices in Montana, demonstrating its commitment to the region. The expansion highlights the brand's successful growth strategy and emphasizes its focus on serving clients in the Mountain West.

data.title: NetZoom Visio Stencils Library Adds Over 1000 Network, Data Center and A/V Stencils
data.description: NetZoom® announced an expansion in its NetZoom Visio Stencils Device library during the first quarter of 2026. Over 1000 customer-requested devices were added along with 26 new manufacturers. This growth includes network, data center infrastructure devices, and AV equipment. The news was revealed in Chicago on April 28, 2026.

data.title: San Diego Brand Eau Vodka Introduces Lightweight Water-Inspired Bottle Designed for Portability
data.description: A new water-inspired bottle format has been introduced by San Diego's Eau Vodka, offering a lightweight and portable alternative to standard glass vodka packaging. Emphasizing mobility, simplicity, and contemporary convenience, the product was launched in San Diego on April 28, 2026. The compact design allows for easy transport in a tote or similar carry-on, catering to the modern consumer's needs.

data.title: Century Complete Announces New Homes Coming Soon to Fleming Island, FL
data.description: Fleming Island Estates is set to showcase top-notch single-family residences offering convenient proximity to Jacksonville. Key points: An opportunity to acquire budget-friendly new homes in Fleming Island, FL. These single-family homes are priced starting from the $320,000s, which is 25% lower than the area's median sale price of $429,467 as reported by Zillow. The Grand Opening...

data.title: Corporate Technologies Acquires RPM Technologies to Expand Life Sciences Expertise and National Reach
data.description: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota on April 28, 2026, Corporate Technologies revealed their acquisition of RPM Technologies, LLC. Corporate Technologies, a prominent national managed IT services and cybersecurity provider catering to small and mid-sized businesses, has acquired RPM Technologies, LLC, a renowned managed services provider recognized for its strong proficiency in the industry.

data.title: Bison Continues to Expand in New York
data.description: Bison Wealth, based in Atlanta, is bolstering its operations in New York by welcoming Gregory Owsiany, an accomplished portfolio manager formerly responsible for managing around $1.3 billion in client assets at BNY. This strategic move reflects Bison's commitment to leveraging experienced professionals to facilitate its continuous growth in the financial sector.
